Document:
# Mothroach
The mothroach is a small hybrid creature produced by combining moth and cockroach DNA in the genetics lab. It is small, capable of speech, and completely harmless.
As a mothroach you are [bold]small[/bold] enough to fit into tight spaces and move through areas the crew cannot easily follow. You can speak, allowing communication with crew members.
You have [bold]no offensive capabilities[/bold] and cannot harm anyone.
